zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine Eure於大約1390年出生在英國達勒姆時，她的父親Sir Ralph Eure11388歲，母親Lady Katherine Aton52歲。她於1401年4月18日與Alexander Neville II在英國達勒姆維頓 勒 維亞爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1459年8月31日在英國越可爾桑頓享年70歲，埋葬在英國越可爾約克。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine Eure于大约1390年出生在英国達勒姆时，她的父亲Sir Ralph Eure11388岁，母亲Lady Katherine Aton52岁。她于1401年4月18日与Alexander Neville II在英国達勒姆維頓 勒 維亞爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1459年8月31日在英国越可爾桑頓享年70岁，埋葬在英国越可爾約克。

nameMeanings.name: Eure
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Ewer
meanings: English (Hertfordshire, Middlesex, and Buckinghamshire): occupational name from Middle English ewere, a shortened form of ewerer ‘servant who supplied guests at the table with water to wash their hands’. The word ewerer is itself a derivative of Old French and Middle English ewer ‘water pitcher’, also recorded in Middle English as ower. Compare Lower .

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of   Katherine  , also occasionally used in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine Eure was born about 1390, in Durham, England, her father, Sir Ralph Eure, was 11388 and her mother, Lady Katherine Aton, was 52. She married Alexander Neville II on 18 April 1401, in Witton le Wear, Durham, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 31 August 1459, in Thornton, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 70, and was buried in York, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine Eure est née environ 1390, à Durham, Angleterre, son père, Sir Ralph Eure, avait 11388 ans et sa mère, Lady Katherine Aton, avait 52 ans. Elle a épousé Alexander Neville II le 18 avril 1401, à Witton le Wear, Durham, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 31 août 1459, à Thornton, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterrée à York, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.Thornton Bridge, Yorkshire, England: Thornton Bridge, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Katherine Eure um 1390 in Durham, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Ralph Eure 11388 und ihre Mutter Lady Katherine Aton 52. Sie hat am 18. April 1401 in Witton le Wear, Durham, England Alexander Neville II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 31. August 1459 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Thornton, Yorkshire, England und wurde in York, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Eure è nata il circa 1390 nel Durham, England, sua padre, Sir Ralph Eure, aveva 11388 anni e sua madre, Lady Katherine Aton, aveva 52 anni. Lei sposato Alexander Neville II il 18 aprile 1401, nel Witton le Wear, Durham, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 31 agosto 1459, nel Thornton, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolta a York, Yorkshire, England.

ja.St Mary Bishophill Junior, York, Yorkshi: イギリスヨークシュアイアヨーク
ja.lifeSummary: Katherine Eureが約1390年にイギリスダルハムで生まれた時，父Sir Ralph Eureは11388歳，母Lady Katherine Atonは52歳であった。1401年4月18日にイギリスダルハムウィットオン ル ウエアルでAlexander Neville IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1459年8月31日にイギリスヨークシュアイアソルントンで70歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアヨークにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Eure(이)가 대략 1390년 영국 뒤람에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Ralph Eure(은)는 11388세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Katherine Aton(은)는 52세였다. 그녀는 1401년 4월 18일 영국 뒤람 윗튼 일 위르에서 Alexander Neville II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1459년 8월 31일 영국 요르크실르 토른턴에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 요르크에 묻혔다.

pt.Thornton Bridge, Yorkshire, England: Thornton Bridge, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Eure nasceu aproximadamente 1390, em Durham, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Ralph Eure, tinha 11388 anos e sua mãe, Lady Katherine Aton, tinha 52 anos. Ela casou-se com Alexander Neville II em 18 de abril de 1401, em Witton le Wear, Durham, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 31 de agosto de 1459, em Thornton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 70 anos, e foi sepultada em York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ro.Thornton Bridge, Yorkshire, England: Thornton Bridge, Yorkshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine Eure родилась около 1390 г. в местности дурам, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Ralph Eure было 11388 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Katherine Aton, 52. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alexander Neville II 18 апреля 1401 г. в местности виттон л вир, дурам, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 31 августа 1459 г. в местности таурнтон, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 70 лет и была похоронена в местности ерк, еркшир, Англия.

Se casó con Alexander Neville II el 18 de abril de 1401, en Witton le Wear, Durham, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija.
